$comment: Name aliases so the 2K dataset joins to the box-score roster despite nickname/spelling differences. Without these, a star under a different name (e.g. box-score 'Anfernee Hardaway' vs 2K 'Penny Hardaway') would fail to match and get OVR-capped as filler. Format: '<2K name>': '<box-score name>'. Both sides are compared via normName. Grow this list whenever the capped-players report (build output) shows a star that should have matched. lastVerified 2026-06-08.
